calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amendments To Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of 200 Brannan Owners Association [Civil Code 4275]
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER IN RE 200 BRANNAN OWNERS ASSOCIATION, Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amendments To Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of 200 Brannan Owners Association [Civil Code 4275] is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
